startPoint.en: Speak to Quartermaster Gully on the docks near the Sarim's Revenge.
startPoint.es: Habla con Quartermaster Gully en los muelles, cerca del Sarim's Revenge.

rewards.name: Medium XP lamp (The Arc)
rewards.display: 1 Medium XP lamp in one of the following skills: Agility, Herblore, Fishing, Thieving, Cooking, Prayer, Runecrafting, Slayer, Construction, Hunter, Dungeoneering, or Divination

rewards.name: Islands That Once Were Turtles teleport
rewards.display: Islands That Once Were Turtles teleport tablet unlocked in the Waiko Reward Shop

text.en: Travel to The Islands That Once Were Turtles.
text.es: Viaja a The Islands That Once Were Turtles.

text.en: Talk to Quartermaster Gully (if you have just completed Harbringer you may need to relog for the chat option to show up). (opciones de chat: 1 Ghosts from the Past miniquest. • Accept • 5 Enough questions. Let's move on.)
text.es: Habla con Quartermaster Gully (si acabas de completar Harbringer, puede que necesites reconectarte para que aparezca la opción de chat). (opciones de chat: 1 Miniaventura Ghosts from the Past. • Aceptar • 5 Suficientes preguntas. Sigamos adelante.)

text.en: Climb both watchtowers on the island and talk to both skeletons of the Skulls pirate and the Skulls mercenary.
text.es: Sube a las dos atalayas de la isla y habla con los esqueletos del pirata Skulls y del mercenario Skulls.

text.en: Continue north and climb up the observatory.
text.es: Continúa hacia el norte y sube al observatorio.

text.en: Talk to the skeleton of the Skulls thief at the top.
text.es: Habla con el esqueleto del ladrón Skulls en la cima.

text.en: Return to Quartermaster Gully. (opciones de chat: 1 Ghosts from the Past miniquest.)
text.es: Regresa con Quartermaster Gully. (opciones de chat: 1 Miniaventura Ghosts from the Past.)
